response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates solid full-stack engineering fundamentals and relevant high-throughput distributed systems experience from Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but the resume lacks the domain-specific expertise this role is built around: there is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical experiment analysis. The demonstrated seniority level (Senior/Staff IC) falls short of the Principal/IC6 target, and there is no track record of cross-team architectural ownership or multi-workstream technical leadership. The recent AI-agent tooling work at re:cinq is directionally interesting but insufficient to bridge the experimentation systems gap.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O — demonstrates production scale credibility
Strong polyglot profile (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#, DLang) well-aligned with the required language stack, with embedded and systems-level work validating depth beyond web
Consistent TDD and software craftsmanship discipline demonstrated across multiple roles, open-source libraries, and community workshops — signals engineering quality mindset
concerns: No evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout automation, or statistical methods for experiment quality — these are the core deliverables of the role

Titles and scope remain at Senior/Staff individual contributor; no demonstrated Principal-level multi-team architectural leadership, cross-org influence, or ownership of foundational platform capabilities
No metrics or telemetry infrastructure experience referenced; growth engineering, funnel analysis, and measurement platform work are entirely absent from the resume
